prose:
The frontier-orbitals task on water was successfully performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set, Tier 'standard'. The calculation was carried out in the gas phase. The HOMO energy is approximately -8.60 eV, and the LUMO energy is approximately +0.34 eV, giving a HOMO-LUMO gap of about 8.94 eV.

The method used was B3LYP/def2-TZVP in PySCF (a quantum chemistry package). The SCF converged after 7 cycles, and the calculation was deemed trustworthy with no warnings from the integrity checks.
